title: 100+ Energy, Ag & Transportation Groups Urge Congress to Reverse CA Vehicle Ban
content: The American Fuel & Petrochemical Manufacturers (AFPM) joined 110 other stakeholders across energy, agricultural and transportation supply chains urging Congressional leadership to use the Congressional Review Act (CRA) to protect American consumers and reverse Californiaâ€™s harmful vehicle mandates, including its expansive ban on sales of new gas, diesel and traditional hybrid cars and trucks over the next decade.
author: Analysts Account
